Amenities & Facilities

0

+
0

At Maikhan Tolgoi Tourist Camp, we strive to provide a comfortable and authentic Mongolian experience while keeping you close to nature. Whether you seek adventure, relaxation, or cultural immersion, our camp is fully equipped to meet your needs.

Dining & Food Services





Savor the flavors of Mongolia at our on-site restaurant, where we serve a variety of traditional and international dishes. Our meals are prepared with fresh, locally sourced ingredients, ensuring both authenticity and quality. Enjoy special dining experiences, including:





Traditional khorkhog (Mongolian-style stone pot cooking)



Barbecue nights by the campfire



Vegetarian and dietary-friendly options upon request

Explore the stunning landscapes surrounding Maikhan Tolgoi with our exciting outdoor activities:



Bicycle





Bow & Arrow





Basketball





Horse Riding





ATV





Visiting a herder's family





Table tennis





Fireworks

Khorgo Volcano



Khorgo Volcano, an extinct volcano at 2,240 meters, last erupted thousands of years ago, shaping the stunning landscape of Arkhangai province. The 200-meter-wide crater offers panoramic views of rugged volcanic terrain, lava fields, and basalt formations. Hiking to the crater, you’ll discover lava caves and tunnels, adding to the area's mystique. A blend of geological wonder and Mongolian folklore, Khorgo is a favorite for hikers, photographers, and nature enthusiasts. Its unique combination of volcanic rock and lush greenery makes it an unforgettable destination in central Mongolia.

Terkhiin Tsagaan Lake



Terkhiin Tsagaan Lake, also known as the "Great White Lake," is one of Mongolia’s most stunning natural wonders. Stretching 16 kilometers in length, its crystal-clear waters are surrounded by hills, lava fields, and meadows. Formed by lava flows from Khorgo Volcano, the lake is home to diverse wildlife, including rare bird species. Perfect for fishing, boating, and swimming, Terkhiin Tsagaan Lake offers a peaceful retreat and a chance to experience Mongolia’s untouched wilderness.

Essential Services & Extras





To ensure a seamless and comfortable stay, we offer:



Free Wi-Fi in common areas



Electricity and charging stations for guests



Souvenir shop with locally handcrafted goods



Laundry services available upon request



Secure parking for private vehicles and tour buses
